title: India Tourism Development Corporation is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: India Tourism Development Corporation is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
India Tourism Development Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Tourism Development Corporation:
India Tourism Development Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Tourism Development Corporation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
